    Enum ExifSensingMethod

    public enum ExifSensingMethod

    Colorsequentialarea

    Color Sequential area.

    Colorsequentiallinear

    Color sequential linear sensor.

    Notdefined

    Not defined.

    OneChipColorArea

    One chip color area.

    ThreeChipColorArea
